name: Mcdonald's Broccoli Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Into blender, put water, flour, dry milk powder, chicken bouillon powder, dried minced onion, and black pepper. Blend on high until smooth.
2. Pick out larger pieces of broccoli and add them to the blender. Blend until tiny bits remain.
3. Set aside 3/4 cup cooking water from the broccoli and discard the rest of the water.
4. Pour the blended mixture into the top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring until smooth and thickened.
5. Stir in the reserved cooking water and finely diced broccoli.
6. Add sour cream, butter, and cheddar cheese slice.
7. Simmer on low heat until desired consistency is reached.
